data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Closing the epic UNSIGNED to reflect that all engineering work is complete and landed, with the sole outstanding item being 5f39's operator attestation; re-verify once the operator records the canary run URL.".
